# Example Project

> Example Java project demonstrating IKE documentation pipeline integration with Java source, tests, and Koncept macros

- [Project Information](https://github.com/IKE-Network/example-project/project-info.html.md)
- [Generated Reports](https://github.com/IKE-Network/example-project/project-reports.html.md)
